category_sources: XQuartz official site says the quartz-wm window manager is included with the XQuartz distribution.
display_name_sources: Official freedesktop GitLab project URL and XQuartz site use quartz-wm.
docs_sources: The freedesktop GitLab project is the official source and project page for quartz-wm.
XQuartz official homepage documents quartz-wm as part of the XQuartz distribution.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the freedesktop GitLab source-control project URL.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: XQuartz official site describes XQuartz as an X.Org X Window System implementation for macOS.
source_facts.description identifies it as the XQuartz window manager.
